chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2046 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.06.2022 Mr. Mir Murtaza, advocate for petitioner Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Qazi, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G Sindh Senior Law Officer ECP (Abdullah Hanjra), Law Officer ECP (Zaheer Abbas) & District Election Commissioner Sanghar (Shahnawaz Brohi) *** Learned counsel for the Petitioner contended that Petitioner has filed his nomination papers as an ‘independent candidate’ and he was allotted symbol as such. He has now approached this Court for the change of symbol. Even if the change is permissible, at this stage this Court cannot do so, as it will cause confusion in the election process. As such petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
